args.code: (() => { game.stamina = 10; game.health = 50; game.time = 20; const before = {stamina: game.stamina, health: game.health, day: game.day, time: game.time}; goSleep(); const after = {stamina: game.stamina, health: game.health, day: game.day, time: game.time}; return JSON.stringify({before: before, after: after}); })()
